query: SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, ae.event_time, ae.method, ae.is_automatic, w.code as worker_code, w.full_name FROM attendance_events ae JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-01' ORDER BY ae.worker_id, ae.event_time;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, ae.event_type, ae.event_time, ae.method, ae.is_automatic, w.code as worker_code, w.full_name FROM attendance_events ae JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-01' ORDER BY ae.worker_id, ae.event_time;
